tweets.text:
As his friends, family and colleagues gather at the U.S. Capitol, here’s a look at how @StateDept and its embassies and consulates around the world are honoring the memory and service of Senator John McCain. ⚡️

https://t.co/xhX8kZyMaV

For the past 14 years the United States, under @PEPFAR and thru work of @CDCgov and @USAID, has partnered with #Namibia’s Ministry of Health and Social Services to fight HIV/AIDS. We remain committed to helping Namibians maintain their hard-won progress. https://t.co/SQ1Yaz3NSp

Today, @usembtashkent Amb. Spratlen joined #Uzbekistan's Deputy Justice Minister Tashkulov to welcome the @AC_Global  to Uzbekistan, demonstrating our growing strategic partnership and the Government of Uzbekistan's commitment to meaningful reform and international engagement. https://t.co/KafB8oRwhp

.@statedeptspox previews the U.S.-#India 2+2 Ministerial Dialogue, where @SecPompeo and @DeptofDefense Secretary Mattis will meet with External Affairs Minister @SushmaSwaraj and Defense Minister @nsitharaman to discuss strengthening strategic, security, and defense cooperation. https://t.co/DbWIVVsFNX
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters at the Department Press Briefing. https://t.co/xE2FUosjzI

.@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley on anti-Israel bias at the @UN: When I saw how abusive all of these countries were being against #Israel, I had no choice but to get up and say this is completely wrong. We are not going to condone this anti-Israel bias. #FDDSummit https://t.co/oKsLWpfzyv
.@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley describes why the United States withdrew from the @UN #HumanRights Council. #FDDSummit https://t.co/rPhqrn7pC6
.@statedeptspox: U.S. strongly condemns the release of convicted terrorist Dimitris Koufodinas who was set loose for a fourth time on a 5-day furlough in #Greece. https://t.co/4tYTzqZ2sH

Special Rep Hook: @SecPompeo & @POTUS are fully committed to our strategy of pressure on the regime, deterrence from bad behavior & support for Iranian people. Nothing less than the security of the American people & a brighter future for the Iranian people is at stake. #FDDSummit https://t.co/OUtFlDVnct

Special Rep Hook: @POTUS wants our allies & partners on board our campaign. Many other nations already have common understandings of threat #Iran poses beyond its nuclear aspirations. We want more of them to join us in confronting full array of Iranian malign activity. #FDDSummit https://t.co/F22VXcIwgG

Special Rep. Hook: We have launched a multi-pronged pressure campaign that reflects @POTUS' goal of protecting the American people and our allies and partners. Regime leaders should feel painful consequences of their violence, bad decision-making, and corruption. #FDDSummit https://t.co/632LQ9RPQz

Special Rep Hook: The nuclear deal was premised on hope #Iran would moderate over time. But Iran still supplies Houthis w/missiles fired at Riyadh, Iran still supports Hamas’ attacks on Israel & Iran still recruits Afghan, Iraqi, Pakistani youth to fight, die in Syria. #FDDSummit https://t.co/AT483X8eAn

Special Rep. Hook: The rial’s value has collapsed in the past year. One third of Iranian youth are unemployed & one third of Iranians live in poverty. Instead of using wealth generated from JCPOA to boost well-being of the people, the regime grabbed it for themselves. #FDDSummit https://t.co/k7U4QXZNnR

Special Representative Hook: We are aware of the suffering of religious minorities in #Iran. We will speak up for them. The #IRFMinisterial last month reinforced our commitment to speaking up for all persecuted people in Iran and defending their right to worship. #FDDSummit https://t.co/W2UCzKpHHt

Special Rep Hook: Iranian regime is last revolutionary regime on earth. Next year will mark 40 years of Iranians living under religious dictatorship. Revolutionary worldview means regime cannot tolerate any ideas coursing thru veins of society that would threaten them. #FDDSummit https://t.co/9yLlkXevXh
Live now: @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters at the Department Press Briefing. https://t.co/Lo9I3fJCDz

.@POTUS welcomed President @UKenyatta to the @WhiteHouse and resolved to elevate the U.S.-#Kenya relationship to a Strategic Partnership, affirming it as a cornerstone of peace, stability and good governance in Africa and the Indian Ocean region. https://t.co/pLx1sgP8eK

Special Rep Hook: EU’s new $20.7 million payment to #Iran perpetuates the regime’s ability to neglect the needs of its people & stifles meaningful policy changes. More money in the hands of the Ayatollah means more money to conduct assassinations in those very European countries. https://t.co/lAWMc3daFT

Today, U.S. Mission to @OAS_official announced visit by @WhiteHouse Advisor @IvankaTrump and @opicgov President & CEO Washburne to address the organization’s member states on Administration efforts to advance women’s empowerment in the Americas on Aug. 27. https://t.co/KITeDGKUJq

.@SecPompeo announced Steve Biegun as Special Representative for #NorthKorea, met with leaders from Macedonia, Qatar, Jordan, United Kingdom, and Kenya, and wished Muslims around the world a blessed Eid al-Adha. Read more about this week at State. https://t.co/OpW0ijw6zF https://t.co/v9qNKRGI4I

As the @UN marks 70 years of peacekeeping (#PK70), the U.S. and #Uganda are working together to continue to support efforts that help countries torn by conflict transition to lasting peace. Read more. https://t.co/gWLL1iY160 @UNPeacekeeping @StateDeptPM @usmissionuganda

ICYMI → Today, @SecPompeo announced that Steve Biegun is joining the  @StateDept team as Special Rep. for #NorthKorea to lead efforts to achieve @POTUS’ goal of the final, fully verified denuclearization of North Korea as agreed to by Chairman Kim. https://t.co/sDyV4SKNxe

.@statedeptspox: Since last Thursday, the @WhiteHouse has sent 14 ambassadorial nominations to the Senate. Thirteen of those nominees are career members of our Senior Foreign Service. We are thrilled to see them moving ahead. https://t.co/owCvwSG74Y

.@statedeptspox: @SecPompeo announced that Steve Biegun joined our team as our new Special Rep. for #NorthKorea. He will lead negotiations & spearhead diplomatic efforts with our allies & partners to achieve our goal of the final, fully-verified denuclearization of North Korea. https://t.co/Ldi9h2GPUK
Live now! @statedeptspox addresses reporters at the Department Press Briefing. https://t.co/VoryPShlip

Today, @SecPompeo announced Steve Biegun is joining the @StateDept team as Special Representative for #NorthKorea, where he will direct all U.S. policy on North Korea, lead negotiations, and spearhead our diplomatic efforts with our allies and partners. https://t.co/3kmXIpHy0E

This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Kenya’s Cabinet Secretary for Foreign Affairs and International Trade Monica Juma to the State Department. @USEmbassyKenya @AsstSecStateAF @foreignofficeke https://t.co/9W3ibgSxMG

Live now! @SecPompeo meets with welcomes #Kenya’s net Secretary for Foreign Affairs and International Trade Monica Juma at the State Department. @USEmbassyKenya @foreignofficeke https://t.co/AzYfY4EHti

Special Representative for #NorthKorea Steve Biegun: @POTUS has created an opening, and it’s one that we must take by seizing every possible opportunity to realize the vision for a peaceful future for the people of North Korea. https://t.co/PejCqfKvCp

.@SecPompeo announces Steve Biegun as the Special Representative for #NorthKorea, who will lead our efforts to achieve @POTUS Trump’s goal of the final, fully-verified denuclearization of North Korea, as agreed to by Chairman Kim Jong Un. https://t.co/fZ9iCBMhpL
Live now! @SecPompeo makes a personnel announcement. https://t.co/ytOsukFnQu
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Jordan’s Foreign Minister @AymanHsafadi to the State Department. @USEmbassyJordan @foreignministry @JoEmbassyUS https://t.co/eUyGO117rq
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #UK Secretary of State for Foreign and Commonwealth Affairs @Jeremy_Hunt to the State Department. @USAinUK @UKinUSA @foreignoffice https://t.co/6DlvGClwWz

Since 1949, Jakiw Palij concealed that he was a guard at the Trawniki slave-labor camp for Jews in Nazi-occupied Poland when he immigrated to the U.S. from Germany. He has now been removed from the U.S. We thank Germany for re-admitting him. https://t.co/xcO2RGcP3i
This afternoon, @SecPompeo met with #Qatar’s Foreign Minister @mba_althani_ at the State Department. @mofaqatar_en @USEmbassyQatar https://t.co/rEh9bWktHj
Secretary Pompeo meets with #Macedonia Minister of Foreign Affairs Nikola Dimitrov at the Department of State. https://t.co/SY1FZVPdZD
Coming Up: Secretary Pompeo meets with #Macedonia Minister of Foreign Affairs Nikola Dimitrov at the Department of State. https://t.co/3EZeW3JYgt

Read how @USUN Ambassador Haley reinforced the strength of the U.S.-#Colombia partnership and the key role the country plays in the region on her recent visit to Bogota where she lead U.S. delegation to inauguration of newly elected President @IvanDuque. https://t.co/aeHqKRTOOw

.@SecPompeo: The United States welcomes the announcement by the #Afghanistan government of a ceasefire conditioned on Taliban participation. This plan responds to the clear and continued call of the Afghan people for peace. It is time for peace. https://t.co/DyC3UgfSOH
Statement by @SecPompeo on #WorldHumanitarianDay. https://t.co/hgqR1ChnoK #WHD2018
Statement by @SecPompeo on the passing of former @UN Secretary-General @KofiAnnan. https://t.co/dlIDLEkYXw

.@SecPompeo met with @UN Special Envoy for #Syria de Mistura & #Mexico's Foreign Secretary @LVidegaray, announced the creation of #Iran Action Group & led the swearing-in of the 194th Foreign Service Generalist Class. Read more about This Week at State: https://t.co/aomftjovfL https://t.co/sRArJ08Pjt
Today, @SecPompeo welcomed #Mexico's Foreign Secretary @lvidegaray to the State Department. @USEmbassyMEX @embamexeua @SRE_mx https://t.co/ZyW8Tk478K

.@SecPompeo announced creation of #Iran Action Group. Read how IAG will drive daily progress to ensure @StateDept remains synchronized with our interagency partners and leads way in growing efforts with nations which share understanding of Iranian threat. https://t.co/Gbk7vdxyTZ

Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook: The #Iran regime has been a force for instability and violence. Our new strategy addresses all manifestations of the Iranian threat, and the new Iran Action Group will be focused on implementing that strategy. https://t.co/IkZbK4ri6a

.@SecPompeo announces the creation of the #Iran Action Group, which will be led by Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook and will be responsible for directing, reviewing, and coordinating all aspects of the @StateDept’s Iran-related activity. https://t.co/G2NDwyEsuQ
Today, @SecPompeo will announce the creation of the #Iran Action Group at 2:30 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz and https://t.co/4PAwVBoTVX.

The robust U.S.-#Vietnam security partnership is based on our mutual commitment to deepen defense cooperation and shared resolve to address regional security challenges. Read the new fact sheet on our security relationship. https://t.co/3EwVovMpBE @statedeptpm @usasiapacific

.@statedeptspox comments on expansion of visa restrictions on individuals involved in undermining of democracy in #Cambodia & reiterates call for the Cambodian govt to take actions to promote national reconciliation by allowing independent media to fulfill their roles unhindered. https://t.co/bEgn0rkUJT

.@statedeptspox: The Iranian regime jails people for peaceful exercising their rights and then jails people who are asked to defend them. These daily #humanrights violations and arbitrary arrests are simply unacceptable. #Iran https://t.co/eFvo6ja9B8

.@statedeptspox: U.S. government strongly condemns & is appalled by today’s suicide attack at an education center in #Kabul. The U.S. continues to stand with the gov't & people of #Afghanistan & will continue to support their efforts to achieve peace & security in their country. https://t.co/q4ZoznUbst

.@statedeptspox: American journalist Austin Tice, who was reporting from #Syria, went missing six years ago to this day. We believe him to be alive. We remain deeply concerned about his wellbeing, and we’re actively working to bring Austin Tice home. https://t.co/FDEIiaCCoR

Last week, @DeptofDefense #SecDef Mattis presented U.K. Secretary of State for Defence @GavinWilliamson with a Foreign Relations of the United States Volume: The Conferences at Washington, 1941-1942, and Casablanca, 1943. Learn more: https://t.co/nigJKJ3L1X #FRUS https://t.co/B6fHhWEMGK

.@statedeptspox: Yesterday, @POTUS nominated eight career members of the Senior Foreign Service to be Ambassador. We hope members of the U.S. Senate will work quickly to get these nominees through the process along with additional nominees. https://t.co/e20Fc8RCLO

Our thanks to U.S. Olympic gold medalist 🥇 @KatieLedecky for deepening US-#Japan cultural bonds & educational exchanges. While in #Tokyo for @PanPacs2018, she held a @SportsDiplomacy swimming clinic in Setagaya Ward, which will host #TeamUSA training camps for @Tokyo2020. https://t.co/hrI89FBngN
On #InternationalYouthDay, @GenderAtState highlights young people who are working to advance girls' education worldwide. https://t.co/MZ3HX35hkP

This week, @SecPompeo participated in #ASEAN meetings in Singapore and met with officials in Indonesia; the United States reimposed sanctions on #Iran; and we marked the 20th anniversary of the attacks on @USEmbassyKenya and @AmEmbTZ. Read more: https://t.co/y8bkw2U3lF https://t.co/pkTmR59rzQ

The members of the #Troika (the United States, the #UnitedKingdom, and #Norway) support the engagement of the region in the recent Khartoum-based negotiations on outstanding governance and security issues. https://t.co/quqeXBHkFp #SouthSudan
.@statedeptspox: Today, I’d like to announce that Robert Palladino will be joining our Press Team as the @StateDept’s Deputy Spokesperson. https://t.co/r7nCVkiy5P

.@statedeptspox: I express our condolences to the victims of the recent earthquakes & aftershocks in #Indonesia. We’re monitoring the situation & stand ready to provide additional aid to the Indonesian Govt. Our thoughts and prayers go out to the Indonesian people. @usembassyjkt https://t.co/hATCMO3ifi

On August 6, Susan Pompeo delivered remarks and led a moment of silence in commemoration of the 20th anniversary of the bombings of @USEmbassyKenya and @AmEmbTZ. Following the commemoration, Mrs. Pompeo viewed a special @DiplomacyCenter exhibition dedicated to the events. https://t.co/CQdibUF0CE
This morning, @SecPompeo met with #Egypt's Foreign Minister Sameh Shoukry at the State Department. @MFAEgypt @USEmbassyCairo @EgyptEmbassyUSA https://t.co/SI3gLszvnV

⚡️ Today, on the 20th anniversary of the bombings of @USEmbassyKenya and @AmEmbTZ, the United States remembers the victims of the attacks, and stands together with our partners in #Kenya and #Tanzania in the continuing fight against terrorism. https://t.co/NqZZpXESWh

.@statedeptspox: At 12:01 a.m., @POTUS’ E.O. entitled “Reimposing Certain Sanctions with Respect to #Iran” went into effect. The E.O. is reimposing sanctions on Iran’s automotive sector & on its trade in gold & precious metals, as well as sanctions related to the Iranian rial. https://t.co/bOgRrQDaDj
.@statedeptspox provides a readout of @SecPompeo's travel to #Singapore, #Malaysia, and #Indonesia. https://t.co/4TRP36hxaU

.@statedeptspox: I want to recognize the 20th anniv. of the terrorist bombings that took place at our embassies in #Kenya & #Tanzania. @SecPompeo said, “We will never forget legacy of those who perished, nor courage, bravery & valor of all who survived.” @USEmbassyKenya @AmEmbTZ https://t.co/QNbQF9J1Wg

Deputy Secretary Sullivan: Even as we remember our fallen colleagues, we continue our efforts to defeat al-Qaida, ISIS, and other global terrorist organizations and to prevent further attacks on the United States and our citizens. Our resolve is as strong today as ever. https://t.co/OJvlR9xEGg

Deputy Secretary Sullivan: August 7th was, and still is, a difficult reminder of the sacrifice members of the @StateDept community make every day to answer the call to public service, a call that is inextricably tied to promoting and defending the interests of our republic. https://t.co/3U7noQcuAz

Deputy Secretary Sullivan: Twenty years after bombings of @USEmbassyKenya and @AmEmbTZ, we are reminded of the bravery, heroism, compassion, and sacrifice of those who are here today and those who were taken from us. https://t.co/wYjAxxPk9S

.@SecPompeo: Today, on the 20th anniversary of the bombings of @USEmbassyKenya and @AmEmbTZ, we will never forget the legacy of those who perished, nor the courage, bravery, and valor of all who survived. https://t.co/3pT3qpZnxs

In #Malaysia, #Singapore, and #Indonesia, @SecPompeo reaffirmed U.S. dedication to #ASEAN and advancing our common security and economic interests with our friends and allies in the #IndoPacific region. Check out some ⚡️ highlights:  https://t.co/AE97ntdmi2
.@SecPompeo spoke to @Kania_MetroTV as he concluded his #IndoPacific trip in #Indonesia. Check out the full interview here: https://t.co/nWAzGNrmoO https://t.co/lfGPsyf2FX

ICYMI, here are some of the key moments from @SecPompeo's trip to #Malaysia, #Singapore, and #Indonesia to reinforce our partnerships and support the U.S.' vision of a free and open #IndoPacific. #ASEAN ⚡️ https://t.co/AE97ntdmi2
.@SecPompeo attends a Trilateral Strategic Dialogue with #Australian @JulieBishopMP and #Japanese Foreign Minister Taro Kono, in #Singapore. https://t.co/lfsx18R3QE

As @USCG celebrates 228 years as the nation’s premier maritime law enforcement agency, read how @StateDeptDSS partners with the U.S. Coast Guard to help provide a safe environment for the conduct of U.S. foreign policy.https://t.co/H8RYVdlOje #cg228

.@POTUS recognizes the long term strategic importance of the world’s most competitive regions. The U.S. will put $113 million in new government resources to support foundational areas of the future, showing our commitment of a free and open #IndoPacific. https://t.co/wuVfck1Wl3

Our partners and allies within #ASEAN know how important the denuclearization #DPRK is for their own security. We expect #Russia and all countries to abide by the #UNSC resolutions and enforce sanctions on #NorthKorea . https://t.co/ZXe1FdI7WU

.@SecPompeo conveyed @POTUS’ commitment to this part of the world that continues to grow in importance. As part of the commitment to advancing regional security in the #IndoPacific region, the U.S. announces nearly $300 million in new funding to reinforce security cooperation. https://t.co/NPfJlbnugJ

.@SecPompeo offers condolences on behalf of the #U.S. to the people of #Laos regarding the recent unfortunate tragedy and loss of life from the dam breach. Our condolences also go to the victims of the flooding and landslide in #Myanmar and the earthquake in #Indonesia. https://t.co/gJC28w13qi
.@SecPompeo met with #Burmese Foreign Minister U Kyaw Tin at the #ASEAN Ministerial in #Singapore. https://t.co/RthIBsktLW
.@SecPompeo met with #ROK FM Kang Kyung-wha at the #ASEAN Ministerial in #Singapore. https://t.co/OQln33VSWr

.@SecPompeo addressed the #IndoPacificBizForum and traveled to #Malaysia and #Singapore, and the @StateDept hosted more than 700 #YALI2018 leaders at the Mandela Washington Fellows Summit. Read more about This Week at State. https://t.co/y9yYF5MqY4
.@SecPompeo greets #China Foreign Minister Wang Yi before their meeting on the margins of the #ASEAN Ministerial in #Singapore. https://t.co/wH2N1JEEWR
.@SecPompeo delivers his opening remarks at the U.S.-#ASEAN Ministerial Meeting in #Singapore. https://t.co/sRTjCwCl4w
During his visit to #Malaysia, @SecPompeo met with Malaysian PM @chedetofficial at the Prime Minister's Office in Putrajaya. https://t.co/WAuKUYnSBr
.@SecPompeo is greeted by Malaysian Chief of Protocol Dato Ashri and @usembassykl Ambassador Kamala Shirin Lakhdhir upon his arrival in Kuala Lumpur, #Malaysia. https://t.co/C3CbjeehXg
